summary: Tested direct-build file persistence and preview handoff fix (tool_choice enforcement). All 9 test cases PASSED for both fintech dashboard and SaaS landing page projects. The fix is working correctly: AI now MUST call create_files tool, files are saved, preview renders content.

issues: Preview appears dark in screenshots due to light-on-white content and JPEG compression, but actual content is rendered correctly when inspected via frame_locator

features_tested.feature: AI response says 'Done — I built the page in app/page.jsx and updated the preview.'
Preview tab shows 'React (Babel) + Tailwind' mode label
Preview iframe #root contains fintech dashboard content
No PlanCard shown for auto-executed message

fintech_dashboard_project.iframe_content: FintechProDashboardTransactionsReportsSettingsSupport$1.2MTotal Assets$500KMonthly Revenue5,000Active ClientsRecent TransactionsInvoice #12345+$2,000Payment to Vendor-$1,500Monthly Subscription-$99Financial InsightsRevenue Growth Expense Breakdown

features_tested.feature: Create NEW project via hub input with 'build a landing page for a SaaS tool'
AI response says 'Done — I built the page in app/page.jsx and updated the preview.'
Preview tab shows 'React (Babel) + Tailwind' mode label
Preview iframe #root contains SaaS landing page content
No PlanCard shown for auto-executed message

saas_landing_page_project.iframe_content: SaaSBrandFeaturesPricingTestimonialsContactTransform Your WorkflowOur SaaS tool helps you manage tasks efficiently and effectively.Get StartedLearn MoreTrusted by Top CompaniesCompany ACompany BCompany CCompany DFeatures to Boost Your Productivity

tool_choice_fix_verification.description: The fix forces tool_choice: { type: 'function', function: { name: 'create_files' } } for direct-edit mode, ensuring AI MUST call the tool
tool_choice_fix_verification.evidence: Both projects show 'Done — I built the page in app/page.jsx' message and preview renders actual content, proving files were saved via create_files tool

seed_data_creation: Created new project via hub input with 'build a landing page for a SaaS tool'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Direct-build file persistence and preview handoff fix fully tested and working. Key findings: (1) tool_choice enforcement in service.js lines 799-802 forces AI to call create_files/update_files tool. (2) Files are saved to DB and preview renders correctly. (3) No PlanCard shown for auto-executed direct-edit requests. (4) Preview iframe content can be verified using frame_locator('#root').text_content() even when screenshots appear dark.
